features.name: level-sensitive always block with single-bit signal
features.description: Code should include an always block with level-sensitive event control using a single-bit signal as the sensitivity list

features.name: non-blocking assignment with part-select
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment where the right-hand side uses part-select indexing to access a single bit from a multi-bit signal

features.name: single-bit part-select from multi-bit input vector
features.description: Code should include a single-bit part-select access to a multi-bit input vector in a non-blocking assignment
